title: Enigma GenAI Experience - Factual Source
content:
Role context:
- Position: Data Scientist in GenAI and ML at Enigma Technologies (from June 2025).
- Scope: Production RAG systems, LLM fine-tuning, ML pipelines, model explainability, and stakeholder-facing delivery.

Core responsibilities documented in source material:
- Design and optimization of production RAG pipelines for large document intelligence workloads.
- LLM fine-tuning and prompt strategy work for domain-specific extraction and classification.
- Deployment and reliability practices in cloud-native ML environments.
- Mentoring and communication across technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Representative initiatives and outcomes:
- Multi-stage document intelligence RAG pipeline for pre-processing, retrieval, extraction, and confidence-based review routing.
- Reported impact includes lower analyst review burden and faster document processing throughput.
- LLM cost optimization via model routing, caching, and selective replacement of premium API usage with task-specific models.
- Semantic and hybrid retrieval systems for business discovery workflows, combining structured constraints with vector retrieval and reranking.

Technical themes highlighted:
- Hybrid retrieval design, chunking strategy, and hallucination mitigation through validation layers.
- Performance and cost tradeoff management in production inference paths.
- Explainability and transparency in model outputs for compliance-sensitive business users.
